subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-29 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: During all the blessed days of Baha'o'llah, my hope always was that a day would come
subcodes.first_line_orig: در تمام ایام مبارک همیشه آرزوی من این بود که روزی بیاید بلکه انشاء الله بجهتی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @exhortations and counsels, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment
